title: Plynf Capability Token (claims)
description: JWT claim set issued by the v0.2 Identity service. Capability tokens are short-lived bearer credentials that encode exactly which tools and workspaces an agent may touch. The verifier (gateway) MUST reject tokens whose claims do not match this schema.

sub.description: Subject — the agent or user the token is issued to.

iss.description: Issuer URL of the Identity service.

aud.description: Audience — the gateway URL(s) for which this token is valid.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent this token represents.

workspace_id.description: Optional — when set, the token is locked to this workspace.

tenant_id.description: Optional tenant identifier for multi-tenant deployments.

scopes.description: List of capability scope strings. Each scope grants either a tool capability or a workspace capability.

rate_limit.description: Optional per-token rate limits enforced by the gateway.

delegation.description: Set when this token was minted on behalf of another principal. Forms a delegation chain.

delegator.description: Subject of the principal that authorised this delegation.

depth.description: How deep this token sits in the delegation chain.
